message:
test(proptest): add 35 property-based tests for beads_types

Covers DAG readiness resolver invariants (cycle detection, blocker counting,
transitive unblock counts, candidate sorting, missing dependencies), serde
roundtrips for all vendored types, status counting, actionability semantics,
parent-child non-blocking edges, from_summary degradation, and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
